default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, article publication, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content team revising April articles based on March feedback; focus on improving tour mentions and destination knowledge](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Recent promotion successful: Vallarta 11% increase, Cabo 7% increase in sales year-over-year](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Publishing goal: \~15 articles/week (7 in English); team to maintain pace for now](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Content strategy evolving: mixing tours with local attractions, using Reddit for authentic insights](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)

## Topics

### Content Revision and Publication Strategy

  - [Mariana revising April articles based on March feedback](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Key improvements: better integration of tours with other attractions, avoiding competitor mentions](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Team using advanced research methods: Google Maps, fact-checking AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=210.0)
  - [Publishing goal: \~15 articles/week (7 in English) across destinations](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Lucero (not present) to be trained on content OS for more efficient publishing](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)

### Traffic and Performance Update

  - [Vallarta and Cabo seeing traffic from new articles](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)
  - [Cabo Night Life article not showing in Google; forced indexing requested](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Cancun content publication delayed, causing concern](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)

### Destination-Specific Content Insights

  - [Cenotes article planned; Angelica to provide detailed list of cenote types and tour options](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Beach articles structure: repeating beaches under different categories (e.g., swimming, sunset) approved](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Including day trip options (e.g., Bacalar) in content to cater to longer-stay visitors](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)

### Tour and Activity Details

  - [Most sailing tours include water activities, except sunset sailings](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [Adventures Group has private cenotes for tours](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Team clarified equipment rental is included in most water-based tours](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Collaboration and Training

  - [Isabel training Lucero on photo selection for articles](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Team adapting to AI usage similar to training new team members](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to meet with Lucero to explain content OS usage](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Angelica to provide detailed cenote information for upcoming article](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Team to prioritize publishing March articles ASAP (15-day indexing lag noted)](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [Lorena to review and provide feedback on Cabo San Lucas beaches article](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
  - [Isabel to start working with Lucero on selecting article images](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Team to maintain current content production pace, reassess if needed](https://fathom.video/share/BpcCMR7e_T8CLMxye3yyWpryqso9Roy5?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)

action_items.description: Revise April blog articles considering comments from March articles
Schedule call with Lucero to explain Content OS usage for publishing articles
Set up meeting between Mariana and Lucero for Content OS training
Provide list of cenotes (types, areas) for Mariana's article on cenotes
Send cenote article outline to Angelica for review
Review and send comments on Cabo San Lucas beaches article
Meet with Lucero tomorrow to discuss article publishing process
Start working with Lucero on selecting trails for Mexico articles
